case_title: ADAN RAMOS ESPINOZA VS. DENNIS CRUMP

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION JUDGMENT ASSIGNED TO CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, ADAN RAMOS AS TO DEFENDANT CRUMP, DENNIS AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WEST-TECH CONSTRUCTION

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, ADAN RAMOS AS TO DEFENDANT CRUMP, DENNIS AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WEST-TECH CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, ADAN RAMOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUMP, DENNIS AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WEST-TECH CONSTRUCTION $7,094.97 PRINCIPAL, $66.09 INTEREST, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,317.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESPINOZA, ADAN RAMOS AS TO DEFENDANT CRUMP, DENNIS AS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WEST-TECH CONSTRUCTION
